# ToolPic - Free Online Image & Video Tools

> ToolPic is a free, privacy-first online platform offering 10 browser-based image and video processing tools. All processing happens 100% client-side — no files are ever uploaded to any server.

## Tools

- **Image Compressor**: Reduce image file size (JPG, PNG, WebP) without visible quality loss. Uses browser-image-compression library.
- **Image Converter**: Convert between image formats (JPG, PNG, WebP, BMP, HEIC). Client-side conversion using Canvas API.
- **Image Crop**: Crop and resize images to exact dimensions. Includes social media presets (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, YouTube).
- **Image Watermark**: Add text or image watermarks to photos. Customizable position, opacity, font, and size.
- **Background Remover**: Remove image backgrounds using AI (TensorFlow.js BodyPix model). 100% client-side AI processing.
- **Image Merge**: Combine multiple photos into one image. Horizontal, vertical, or grid layouts.
- **Video Compressor**: Compress MP4, WebM, AVI videos using FFmpeg WASM. Runs entirely in browser.
- **Video Converter**: Convert between video formats (MP4, WebM, AVI, MOV). FFmpeg WASM powered.
- **Video to GIF**: Convert video clips to animated GIFs. Customizable frame rate, size, and duration.
- **Extract Audio**: Extract audio tracks (MP3, WAV, AAC) from video files. FFmpeg WASM based.

## Key Features

- **100% Free**: No registration, no watermarks, no limits
- **Privacy-First**: All processing happens in your browser. Files never leave your device.
- **20 Languages**: Available in English, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Russian, Arabic, Hindi, Italian, Turkish, Vietnamese, Thai, Indonesian, Dutch, Polish, Ukrainian, and Malay
- **No Installation**: Works in any modern browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
- **Fast**: Leverages WebAssembly (FFmpeg WASM) for near-native video processing speed

## Technical Stack

- Built with Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS
- Image processing: browser-image-compression, Canvas API, TensorFlow.js
- Video processing: FFmpeg WASM (@ffmpeg/ffmpeg)
- Deployed on Cloudflare Workers (edge computing)

## URL Structure

- Homepage: https://toolpic.me/en
- Tools: https://toolpic.me/{locale}/tools/{tool-slug}
- Blog: https://toolpic.me/{locale}/blog/{post-slug}

## Contact

- Website: https://toolpic.me
